skills.title: Production tools I reach for
skills.description: A focused stack for modern product work: typed interfaces, pragmatic APIs, cloud delivery, and Web3 when it adds real leverage.

agenticWorkflow.title: Agentic workflow stack
agenticWorkflow.description: I use AI agents as a development loop: plan with context, split work into focused agents, review the diffs, and automate the repeatable parts without losing engineering judgement.

tools.name: Codex
tools.description: Codebase-aware changes, bug fixes, tests, and PR-ready iterations inside real repositories.

tools.name: Claude Code
tools.description: Architecture passes, refactors, code reviews, and long-context problem solving when the shape is still forming.

tools.name: Hermes
tools.description: Project memory, handoffs, and lightweight orchestration so agent work stays connected to intent.

tools.name: Cursor Cloud Automations
tools.description: Async chores, queued fixes, and automation runs that keep momentum while I review the important decisions.

principles: Small agents, clear context, reviewed output.
Automate the repeatable parts; keep taste and responsibility human.

interest.title: Spending time with my Kid
interest.description: I love spending time with my kid when I'm not coding. She is full of energy and positivity.

interest.title: Bonsai 🌳
interest.description: Personal project: Bonsai is a portfolio dashboard to track your entire net worth in one place—crypto, stocks, real estate, and collectibles. Automated tracking, real-time data, and read-only connections so you stop juggling spreadsheets and multiple apps.

interest.title: Photography
interest.description: Spending time in the nature taking photography.

interest.title: Anotherblock
interest.description: Previously, I worked on the Frontend at Anotherblock.

timeline.title: Developer journey
timeline.description: A compressed path from self-taught Web3 experiments to production product work in medtech, e-commerce, and AI-assisted engineering.

items.title: BabyBjörn — Full-stack developer
items.description: Building across the e-commerce platform: backend APIs, serverless functions, frontend features, payments, and internal developer workflows.

items.title: Anotherblock
items.description: Built frontend experiences that connected Ethereum smart contracts, ethers.js, and GraphQL-backed marketplace data.

items.title: ETH Denver winner
items.description: Won among 600+ teams with a knowledge management tool using Notion-like commands for on-chain data.

items.title: Bonsai pivot
items.description: Reframed Bonsai from a Web3 dashboard into a broader portfolio tracker for crypto, stocks, real estate, and collectibles.

items.title: Bonsai Finance pre-alpha
items.description: Launched an early Ethereum asset and NFT dashboard that later evolved into a broader portfolio product.

items.title: Mindler
items.description: Joined early at a medtech startup, worked across web and mobile, and led the psychologist dashboard used by 200+ professionals.

items.title: Podme and Redmind internships
items.description: Built podcast analytics tooling, React Native features, and got hands-on experience shipping with real product teams.

items.title: SALT full-stack bootcamp
items.description: Completed an intensive full-stack JavaScript program focused on mob programming, agile delivery, and modern web development.

items.title: OnChain Jobs
items.description: Co-founded a hiring product for blockchain companies and used it as a real-world path into JavaScript and product building.

items.title: Smart contracts and first code
items.description: Started programming after discovering Ethereum and built HashDrop, a site for tracking token launches.
